title: narcissus tazetta subsp. varians
intro: Narcissus tazetta subsp. varians, also known as the Chinese yellow narcissus or tazetta narcissus, is a type of perennial bulbous plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is native to China and Korea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and prevent the formation of blood clots. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta subsp. varians include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea or extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
